title: DodagState.process_dio: No validation of neighbor_id type before use
description: In python/src/lichen/rpl/dodag.py, the neighbor_id parameter changed from str to IPv6Address. However, the function has no runtime validation that the passed value is actually an IPv6Address. If a caller passes a string (legacy code), the dict lookup self.parents.get(neighbor_id) would fail silently (different hash). Consider adding explicit type checking or using to_ipv6() coercion like other modules.
